purpose: Prove that the exact repository commit can be installed, built, supplied with its project truth and cockpit data, started and browser-tested from an isolated temporary clone without pre-existing dependencies or build artifacts.
requiredSteps: clone without hardlinks and without checkout reuse
checkout the exact source commit detached
reject pre-existing dependencies and build artifacts
stage required project truth and cockpit data into the preview artifact
start the installed Vite preview server
run Studio desktop and mobile smoke
run Cockpit desktop and mobile smoke
run Academy desktop and mobile smoke
run Readiness desktop and mobile smoke
write a machine-readable report and hashed proof files
requiredNegativeTests: never upgrade PR1 to CLOSED_VERIFIED without an observed second-person run

automatedProof.scope: base Studio, Academy and Readiness drill before UI1 cockpit extension

readinessEffect.remainingProof: fresh supported-machine installation drill observed by a second person

forbiddenClaims: cockpit fresh-install extension proven before its own green CI run
beginner ready without an observed novice run
production ready without a complete reviewed episode
